programmes.show_description: Island And Desert. Guy Fieri hunts desert and island flavour. He enjoys nostalgic breakfast tarts at a café in California and fish and chips at a gluten-free spot in Hawaii. S26, Ep16
Soakin' Up Maui. Guy Fieri cruises Maui, Hawaii, with his buddy chef Reno Henriques for regional favourites such as moco and kalbi ribs, food truck fare and St. Louis-style barbecue. S25, Ep1
Portland, ME. Adam Richman visits the land of lighthouses and lobsters: Portland, Maine. He samples lobster right out of the pot and some of the best coastal views imaginable. S2, Ep34
Niagara Falls. Adam gets romantic at Niagara Falls. Adam has a date with a steak that barely fits on a plate. Then he crosses the border for the Italian Challenge. S2, Ep35
Key To The City & A Key-Tar Cake. Buddy is in for a blast from the past when he is asked to make a retro cake for an 80's tribute band. Plus, he is given the key to his birthplace. S3, Ep12
Barbers & Bulls. It is the anniversary of the barbershop where Buddy's been getting his hair cut since he was a kid and he wants to make them a cake they won't forget. Will he cut it? S3, Ep13

Copenhagen. In Copenhagen, Paul Hollywood meets local baker and celebrity - Mette Blomsterberg. She shows him how to bake Kranskake - a delicious almond cookie tower. S1, Ep6
Madrid. Paul Hollywood meets up with Spanish celebrity chef and his friend, Omar Allibhoy, in Madrid. He shows Paul traditional choux pastry treats filled with sweet cream. S1, Ep7
Blues. The bikers head to New Orleans, where they meet blues musician Little Freddie King and share their own take on a traditional, Southern classic - the po' boy sandwich. S1, Ep2
Home Sweet Home: Labor Day. Ree serves up easy, delicious Labor Day eats. There are crispy wings with hot honey sauce and spicy pimento cheese grits, and divine peach shortcakes. S25, Ep9
Home Sweet Home: In Minutes. Ree makes quick family meals at home on the ranch. There's pork marsala with mushrooms, grilled shrimp panzanella and spinach artichoke calzones. S25, Ep10

programmes.show_name: Jamie's Easy Meals For Every Day
programmes.show_description: Jamie rustles up a super-fast and delicious crispy breaded chicken for the family. Plus, he transforms a burger by using sweet potato in two ways. S1, Ep15

programmes.show_name: Jamie's Easy Meals For Every Day
programmes.show_description: Jamie cooks up a bold sausage casserole, packed full of flavour. Plus, he makes an aubergine salad, served with the quickest homemade flatbreads. S1, Ep16
Italian Old And New. Ina takes a culinary trip to Italy. She makes tasty roasted tomatoes with pesto and Parmesan. Plus, she bakes an Italian dessert with wine and liqueurs. S4, Ep9
Afternoon Tea To Go. Ina celebrates a friend's new shop and makes treats for her customers. She bakes red velvet cupcakes, shortbread cookies and orange curd with strawberries. S4, Ep10
Ten bakers remain and their bread making skills are put to the test. Judges Paul Hollywood and Mary Berry keep a close eye on the bakers who face three more difficult challenges. S2, Ep3
The showstopper challenge sees the remaining bakers attempt to bake and present a macaroon display that tastes as good as it looks. Who will be eliminated from the competition? S2, Ep4

programmes.show_name: James Martin's United Cakes Of America
programmes.show_description: In Maryland, James heads to a farm to pick fruit for one of the freshest peach cakes in the state. Plus, he puts his own twist on a decadent coffee and rum cake. S1, Ep3

programmes.show_name: James Martin's United Cakes Of America
programmes.show_description: In Pennsylvania, James visits an Amish community to learn about shoofly pie. Plus, he makes banoffee pie and a treacle cake with a secret ingredient. S1, Ep4

programmes.show_name: James Martin's United Cakes Of America
programmes.show_description: In Philadelphia, James meets a family who have run a bakery since 1930. Then, he returns to the kitchen to cook his grandmother's recipe for lemon curd butterfly cakes. S1, Ep5

programmes.show_name: James Martin's United Cakes Of America
programmes.show_description: James is in Philadelphia to meet three brothers who are known for their legendary butter cake. Plus, he demonstrates how to make a delicious fig and butter cake. S1, Ep6

Oxford. In Oxford, James is joined by top chef Monica Galetti, who discovers the delights of an organic local distiller. Plus, James visits Raymond Blanc. S1, Ep7
South Wales. James is in South Wales, accompanied by his mate, top chef Stephen Terry. They discover award-winning Welsh wine and organic Welsh chocolate. S1, Ep8
Asia, Africa And India. Guy Fieri tucks into big international flavours. He visits a Filipino joint in LA, samples Ethiopian cuisine and enjoys Indian classics in Minneapolis. S25, Ep2
Creole, Cold Cuts And Crepes. Guy Fieri samples gumbo in LA, a Minneapolis deli serving meatless meats and a Hawaiian noodle spot dishing out ramen and Vietnamese crepes. S25, Ep3
Chew And Brew. Guy Fieri samples pub food in Minneapolis, Miami and LA, from wild boar gnocchi to a lamb belly BLT. And, he meets Harry Wayne Casey from KC and The Sunshine Band! S25, Ep4
Sausage, Seafood And Shawarma. Guy Fieri rolls into Minneapolis for a family pizza-making tradition, Miami for Haitian classics and Portsmouth, NH, for global-inspired street food. S25, Ep6
Butte. Adam tries a local staple in Butte, Montana: the pasty, a delicious meat-and-vegetable-filled pastry whose culinary tradition is as old as the mines. S2, Ep36
Sacramento. In Sacramento, Adam visits the California State Fair for fried food on a stick. Later, he tucks into five pounds of chili-smothered hot dogs in the Knucklehead Challenge! S2, Ep37
Helmet Cake, Healthy Mauro, & Huge Trainers. It's National Train Day, so Buddy and the team have a go at making a huge cake, complete with tunnels for model trains to pass through. S3, Ep15
Strawberries, Sinatra & Sick Ovens. Buddy makes a yummy cake for the Frank Sinatra themed Broadway show Come Fly Away, but trouble is afoot when the ovens start playing up again. S3, Ep16

Dave Myers and Si King explore the food of the American South. They start in Memphis, Tennessee, where they try iconic Southern dishes: a soul stew and fried chicken. S1, Ep1
Rock And Roll. The duo follow in the footsteps of music legends and sample traditional Tennessean dishes at a classic diner. Next, they visit Elvis Presley's mansion in Memphis. S1, Ep3
Easy Weeknight Dinners. Ree has four speedy suppers for ideal weeknight meals. She makes Cajun surf and turf pasta, pineapple chicken stir-fry and a quick corn quesadilla. S25, Ep11
Tailgate Get-Togethers. Ree Drummond shares tailgate-friendly favourites for game day. She makes portable Italian pork sandwiches, and easy slow-cooker teriyaki ribs. S25, Ep12

programmes.show_name: Jamie's Easy Meals For Every Day
programmes.show_description: Roast Chicken/Prawn Linguine. Jamie gives traditional roast chicken a delicious French twist. Plus, he cooks his take on a creamy prawn linguine for his mentor Gennaro Contaldo. S1, Ep17

programmes.show_name: Jamie's Easy Meals For Every Day
programmes.show_description: Roast Chicken Margherita/Prawn Toast Toastie. Jamie reinvents a roast chicken by combining it with the flavours of a Margherita pizza. Plus, he whips up prawn toast toasties. S1, Ep18
Summertime Easy. The sun is shining, and Ina is making some tasty summertime dishes. She makes roasted shrimp with feta and mouth-watering salted caramel ice cream. S5, Ep1
Flour Power. Ina reveals all her bread-baking secrets. She makes honey white bread, gets creative with breadcrumbs and mussels and builds a tasty tuna and hummus sandwich. S5, Ep2
The seven remaining bakers are challenged to make a selection of pies - including the pastry! Who will be named Star Baker and who will leave The Great British Bake Off? S2, Ep5
The remaining five bakers have to impress judges Mary Berry and Paul Hollywood with their dessert skills. Who will have what it takes to book a place in the semi-finals? S2, Ep6

programmes.show_name: James Martin's United Cakes Of America
programmes.show_description: James rides through the streets of Brooklyn in a food truck that sells tasty oatmeal cookies. Then, he demonstrates how to make an instant strawberry gateau. S1, Ep7

programmes.show_name: James Martin's United Cakes Of America
programmes.show_description: In New York, James tracks down a historic fine dining restaurant that is the spiritual home of the baked Alaska. Plus, he makes a spiced ginger banoffee cheesecake. S1, Ep8

programmes.show_name: James Martin's United Cakes Of America
programmes.show_description: James goes on a tour of trendy Brooklyn before munching on a modern American classic: whoopie pie. He makes a passion fruit version and meets baking legend, Cake Man Raven. S1, Ep9

programmes.show_name: James Martin's United Cakes Of America
programmes.show_description: In Harlem, James visits a bakery famous for its carrot cake. Next, he heads to Connecticut to a blueberry farm, then makes a delicious toasted blueberry muffin. S1, Ep10

Long Island, New York. Casey Webb heads to Long Island for an Italian chicken parmesan-pizza hybrid, a twist on a Jewish meat-and-potato tradition and a 10-scoop ice cream challenge. S5, Ep1
Delaware Beaches. Casey Webb's quest for the best takes him to Delaware for an ice cream custard that has locals lining up. Plus, he takes on a daunting surf and turf challenge. S5, Ep2
Tame The Troublemaker. Mika Leon squares off against Brad Delgado, accusing him of stealing her recipes. Tommy Jobst and Chris Lombardi have an epic burger showdown. S1, Ep3
Cosmopolitan Comfort. This trip, Guy Fieri tucks into cosmopolitan comfort food. He samples corned beef and cabbage, Ethiopian specialties, and lamb poutine-loaded hot dogs! S25, Ep7
Burgers, Buns And Bagels. Guy Fieri is going carb-crazy this trip! He finds a deli serving up lamb burgers and ribs. And, a Koreatown eatery makes Asian buns and a bacon-corn dish. S25, Ep8
